full_text:
Sun Liang (Ziming) 孫亮 (子明)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sun Liang (孫亮), styledZiming (子明). Became Emperor, but was dethroned by Sun Chen after failed attempt to remove Chen. Sun Liang was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Sun Liang lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
